forbidden_capabilities: mutable branch, release-only reference or short commit as build authority
fabricated source archive, compiler, log, binary size or binary digest evidence
execution of configure, build or other argv read from a manifest by the verifier
committed source archive, checkout, build log or compiled binary
model weight download, conversion, quantization, benchmark or admission claim
license approval or model bundle verification claim
production readiness or operational attestation claim
acceptance: official llama.cpp release b9637 is bound to full commit aedb2a5e9ca3d4064148bbb919e0ddc0c1b70ab3
authority fixes exact source archive URI, Linux x86_64 build profile, argv, evidence paths and four required targets
external build evidence schema distinguishes PENDING_BUILD from BUILT
committed baseline contains no fabricated build observations and cannot verify
collector hashes bounded existing evidence without executing manifest commands
verifier rejects traversal, symlinks, non-regular files, duplicate paths and targets, inode aliasing, dirty source, drift and hash mismatch
all quantization recipes bind to the exact full toolchain commit
controlled source-build runbook preserves source, environment, commands, logs and binary identities
Ruff, strict mypy, full pytest with coverage and repository security/runtime gates pass
